calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-17-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Dolores Chong, Esq. for Petitioner: Jean Tse, present as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Kaylee Hyun Jun, was swron and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Kaylee Tse.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-08-2004 Reset To Aug-17-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Gena Eales.
Dolores Chong, Esq., for Petitioner: Jean Tse, present for the minor: Kaylee Hyun Jun, was sworn and examined.
Lacks the minor's father consent and without proper notice, the Court continued this matter to August 17, 2004 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218, for the Petitioner to serve notice on Minor's father and file Proof of Service or obtain an order for Dispensing Notice.
